title: Optimal Code Generation
scenario: Create a prompt that generates an optimal solution to the 0/1 knapsack problem, given a set of items with weights and values. The prompt should be able to handle different problem sizes and generate code that is efficient, readable, and follows best practices.
constraints: Must use dynamic programming to solve the problem
Must be able to handle different problem sizes

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated solution is optimal and returns the maximum value
The generated code is efficient and uses dynamic programming
The generated code is readable and follows best practices
